metadata.name: predacy
metadata.description: Predacy core Anchor program — sealed-bid batch auctions, LMSR bootstrap pools, blind LP vault, claim + redeem on Solana

instructions.name: accrue_maker_credit
docs: Relayer credits a maker for absorbing taker volume in a settled
batch. Tops up an existing credit or creates a fresh one (init_if_needed).

instructions.name: approve_ika_message
docs: Approve a message for Ika dWallet signing via CPI.
Creates a MessageApproval PDA; Ika's network then writes a signature
back into it. Used for cross-chain signing (Polygon/Polymarket).
See `approve_ika_message.rs` for full usage.

accounts.name: ika_program
docs: The Ika dWallet program. Identified by address to prevent confused-deputy
attacks — only the real Ika program can be invoked.
is invoked via CPI; no data reads from this account.

accounts.name: ika_coordinator
docs: Ika's DWalletCoordinator PDA (seeds: [b"dwallet_coordinator"] in Ika's program).
Read-only — the Ika program reads the current epoch from it.

accounts.name: message_approval
docs: The MessageApproval PDA to create. Seeds are enforced by Ika's
approve_message validation on its end — we pass it as an unchecked
account writable. Ika will init it with status=Pending.

accounts.name: dwallet
docs: The dWallet account (created via DKG). Authority must be our CPI PDA.

accounts.name: cpi_authority
docs: Our program's CPI authority PDA. Ika's program verifies this is a
signer derived from our program's ID + the canonical seed.

accounts.name: predacy_program
docs: Our own program, required by Ika's CPI validation to prove the caller.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Pays rent for the newly-created MessageApproval PDA.

instructions.name: bootstrap_fill
docs: Relayer-attested fill against the Tier 0 LMSR curve. Mutates curve
state; actual token settlement still flows through lock_funds.
Caller must be the EventHandle authority.

instructions.name: claim_maker_rebate
docs: Maker withdraws their pro-rata share of the closed rebate pool.

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC token account. PDA-owned by `rebate_pool`.

accounts.name: maker_usdc
docs: Maker's USDC destination — typically their ATA.

accounts.name: claimer_account
docs: Claimer's token/USDC account for payout

accounts.name: nullifier
docs: Nullifier PDA — init fails if already exists (double-claim prevention)

accounts.name: recipient_account
docs: Recipient's token account for payout (can be any wallet — privacy)

accounts.name: relayer
docs: Relayer submits on behalf of trader (pays rent + fees)

instructions.name: close_rebate_pool
docs: Operator marks the rebate pool closed; required before claims start.

instructions.name: commit_lp_capital
docs: LP deposits USDC under an EventHandle, receiving virtual shares
against the per-event LP vault. Capital auto-refunds at
`commitment_expires_at` via withdraw_lp_capital.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault PDA. The first call to commit_lp_capital under this event
initialises it; subsequent calls just mutate state.

accounts.name: position
docs: Per-(vault, depositor) position PDA. Created on first deposit; reused
on later top-ups within the same window. After withdraw, position
can be re-initialised for a fresh commitment by closing it first.

accounts.name: vault_usdc
docs: Vault's USDC token account. Must be a PDA-owned ATA so the vault
itself authorises payouts at withdraw time.

accounts.name: depositor_usdc
docs: Depositor's USDC source account.

instructions.name: commit_lp_capital_blind
docs: Tier 1 Blind LP deposit — same as commit_lp_capital but additionally
stores a 32-byte Encrypt ciphertext public key in the LP position.
The ciphertext is created off-chain by the relayer via gRPC
`CreateInput` BEFORE this tx fires; we just persist the id.
See docs/LIQUIDITY.md §7 + Sprint 2.1 feasibility test.

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: User's USDC token account (source of escrow)

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: Market's USDC vault (escrow destination)

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's outcome token account (YES or NO tokens being sold)

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Market's YES or NO vault (destination for escrowed sell tokens)

instructions.name: create_event_handle
docs: Create an EventHandle PDA — the unit of LP commitment that downstream
markets inherit fee and graduation parameters from. See
docs/LIQUIDITY.md §4 for the full design rationale.

instructions.name: init_bootstrap_pool
docs: Initialise a Tier 0 LMSR Bootstrap Pool for a specific market.
Caller must be the EventHandle authority. See docs/LIQUIDITY.md §5.1.

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: Market's USDC vault — receives the seed transfer. Must equal the
`usdc_vault` field stamped on the Market account at create time.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — the protocol's collateral token.

accounts.name: funder_usdc
docs: Authority's USDC ATA — source of the seed transfer. Must hold
at least `event_handle.bootstrap_seed_usdc`. The authority signs
the transfer below; no PDA seeds needed since `funder_usdc.owner
== authority`.

instructions.name: init_rebate_pool
docs: Stand up the rebate pool for an EventHandle. Operator-only.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint on Solana

accounts.name: relayer_usdc
docs: Relayer's USDC account (receives gap USDC)

accounts.name: relayer_yes
docs: Relayer's YES token account (receives excess YES tokens)

accounts.name: relayer_no
docs: Relayer's NO token account (receives excess NO tokens)

instructions.name: log_rebate_deposit
docs: Bookkeeping for off-chain SPL fee deposits into the pool ATA. Bumps
the `accrued_taker_fees_usdc` counter for UI/auditability. Token
transfer is a vanilla SPL ix outside this call.

instructions.name: lp_settle_batch
docs: Relayer-attested per-batch state mutation. Records the LP vault's
signed inventory delta and accrued rebate share.

accounts.name: winning_mint
docs: The winning outcome token mint (YES or NO)

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's winning token account (tokens to burn)

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: User's USDC account (receives payout)

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: Market's USDC vault (source of payout)

instructions.name: set_bootstrap_graduated
docs: Toggle a BootstrapPool's graduated flag. Used by the relayer once
Tier 1 capital crosses the EventHandle's graduation_threshold; can
be reverted if Tier 1 unexpectedly empties out.

accounts.name: relayer_usdc
docs: Relayer returns gap tokens and USDC proceeds

instructions.name: update_event_close
docs: Extend (or shorten) the `closes_at` timestamp on an existing
EventHandle. Authority-only. Used when a long-running broadcast
outlives its originally-registered close window.

instructions.name: verify_test_vectors
docs: Discriminator test: run `Groth16Verifier` with the canonical test
vectors from groth16-solana's own test suite (mode=0), or with
user-supplied proof bytes against our BATCH_VK (mode=1).

instructions.name: withdraw_lp_capital
docs: LP (or auto-refund crank) redeems a position after the commitment
window expires. Pro-rata payout from the vault's current USDC
balance.

accounts.name: vault_usdc
docs: Vault's USDC token account — the source of payout. PDA-owned by
`vault` so we can sign the transfer with vault seeds.

accounts.name: depositor_usdc
docs: Where the LP receives their USDC. Typically the depositor's ATA.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Whoever is cranking this — could be the depositor themselves or a
relayer-sponsored auto-refund. Pays the rent for any account
closures (none in v1; future close=position).

errors.name: InvalidBatchStatus
errors.msg: Batch is not in the expected status

errors.name: BatchWindowNotElapsed
errors.msg: Batch window has not elapsed yet

errors.name: MaxOrdersReached
errors.msg: Maximum number of orders reached for this batch

errors.name: NullifierAlreadyUsed
errors.msg: Nullifier already used — double claim attempt

errors.name: RescueDelayNotElapsed
errors.msg: Rescue delay not elapsed — must wait 7 days

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized — caller is not the authority

errors.name: BatchMarketMismatch
errors.msg: Batch does not belong to this market

errors.name: InvalidEventTiming
errors.msg: Invalid event timing — closes_at must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidEventFees
errors.msg: Invalid fee parameters — treasury+rebates must equal taker bps

fields.name: market_id
docs: Identifies the market this pool backstops.

fields.name: event_handle
docs: EventHandle this pool was created under — for fee/graduation params.

fields.name: seed_usdc
docs: Seed capital, 6-decimal USDC. Set once at init, immutable.

fields.name: current_q
docs: Total collateral currently in the pool: seed + accrued buy-side
USDC − payouts. 6-decimal USDC.

fields.name: b_param
docs: LS-LMSR `b` parameter. Recomputed on each fill as α × current_q
where α = LMSR_ALPHA_BPS / 10_000. Storing it explicitly so the
off-chain pricer doesn't have to recompute it.

fields.name: yes_shares
docs: Outstanding YES shares (1 share = 1 USDC if YES wins). 6-decimal.

fields.name: no_shares
docs: Outstanding NO shares. 6-decimal.

fields.name: graduated
docs: Set by the relayer once the market hits the graduation threshold
(≥2 batches × ≥graduation_threshold_usdc). After this, bootstrap_fill
rejects all calls — Tier 1 LP vault takes over.

fields.name: realized_pnl
docs: Cumulative realized pnl on closed positions, signed. Resolved at
market resolution by `redeem_outcome` flow.

fields.name: handle_id
docs: 32-byte stable id, e.g. blake3(canonical_event_label).

fields.name: category
docs: EventCategory, encoded as u8 for ABI stability.

fields.name: authority
docs: Operator who can close/refund the event early.

fields.name: closes_at
docs: Unix seconds. Tier 1 LP capital auto-refunds after this timestamp.

fields.name: graduation_threshold_usdc
docs: Cumulative volume across batches this event must hit before
graduation (Tier 1 backstop activates).

fields.name: graduation_batches
docs: Number of consecutive batches that each must clear at least
graduation_threshold_usdc / graduation_batches volume.

fields.name: fee_bps_taker
docs: Fee bps charged on filled volume by takers. Default 30.

fields.name: fee_bps_treasury
docs: Of the taker fee, this slice goes to protocol treasury. Default 10.

fields.name: fee_bps_rebates
docs: Of the taker fee, this slice funds the maker-rebate pool. Default 20.

fields.name: bootstrap_seed_usdc
docs: Bootstrap-pool seed in 6-decimal USDC. Protocol-funded per market
under this handle. Default 100_000_000 = $100.

fields.name: closed
docs: Set to true once the operator closes the event. Triggers refund flow.

fields.name: shares_plaintext
docs: Plaintext share balance for v1. Becomes irrelevant in v2 once
`fhe_shares_ct` becomes the source of truth — but kept on-chain
for the migration window.

fields.name: fhe_shares_ct
docs: Reserved blob for FHE-encrypted share balance (v2). v1 = all zeros.

fields.name: deposited_usdc
docs: 6-decimal USDC originally deposited. Used to compute breakeven /
PnL on the front-end without revealing share-level math.

fields.name: commitment_expires_at
docs: Auto-refund cutoff. After this timestamp, withdraw_lp_capital can
be called by anyone (relayer crank or the LP themselves).

fields.name: withdrawn
docs: Set true once withdrawn — prevents double-withdrawal.

fields.name: event_handle
docs: EventHandle this vault is bound to. Each event has exactly one vault.

fields.name: total_capital_usdc
docs: Public aggregate of all deposits, 6-decimal USDC. Always plaintext —
transparency about total capital is a feature, not a privacy leak.

fields.name: total_shares
docs: Total virtual shares outstanding. Used to compute per-position pro-rata
payouts: payout = position.shares / total_shares × current vault NAV.

fields.name: realized_yes_position
docs: Net inventory in YES tokens, signed. Positive = vault is long YES.
Updated each batch settlement when vault absorbs residual.

fields.name: realized_no_position
docs: Net inventory in NO tokens, signed. Positive = vault is long NO.

fields.name: accumulated_rebates_usdc
docs: Accumulated rebate share earned across batches under this event,
6-decimal USDC. Distributed pro-rata at withdraw time.

fields.name: fhe_encrypted_state
docs: Reserved blob for FHE-encrypted aggregate state (v2). Sized for a
full EUint64 ciphertext with margin. v1 = all zeros.

fields.name: credit
docs: Cumulative credit. Per-fill credits are added on accrue_maker_credit.
Future v2: weight by `volume × distance_from_mid_bps` for sharper
price-improvement incentives (Limitless pattern).

fields.name: accrued_taker_fees_usdc
docs: Cumulative USDC routed into the pool. Used for accounting/UI;
actual payouts read the live token-account balance.

fields.name: total_credits
docs: Sum of all maker credits accrued under this pool. Used as the
denominator in claim_maker_rebate's pro-rata math.

fields.name: closed
docs: Set true at event end. Only after closed=true can makers claim.
